en: The LORD said to Moses and Aaron in the land of Egypt,
zh: 耶和華在埃及地告訴摩西和亞倫說：

en: "This month shall be for you the beginning of months. It shall be the first month of the year for you.
zh: “你們要以本月為正月，為一年的第一個月。

en: Tell all the congregation of Israel that on the tenth day of this month every man shall take a lamb according to their fathers' houses, a lamb for a household.
zh: 你們要告訴以色列全體會眾說：本月初十，他們各人要按著父家取羊羔，一家一隻。

en: And if the household is too small for a lamb, then he and his nearest neighbor shall take according to the number of persons; according to what each can eat you shall make your count for the lamb.
zh: 如果一家的人太少，吃不了一隻羊羔，家長就要和靠近他家的鄰居按著人數共取一隻。你們預備羊羔的時候，要按著各人的食量計算。

en: Your lamb shall be without blemish, a male a year old. You may take it from the sheep or from the goats,
zh: 你們的羊羔要毫無殘疾，一歲以內的公羊；你們可以從綿羊或山羊裡取。

en: and you shall keep it until the fourteenth day of this month, when the whole assembly of the congregation of Israel shall kill their lambs at twilight.
zh: 你們要把羊羔留到本月十四日，在黃昏的時候 ，以色列全體會眾要把羊羔宰殺。

en: "Then they shall take some of the blood and put it on the two doorposts and the lintel of the houses in which they eat it.
zh: 他們要取點血，塗在吃羊羔的房屋兩邊的門柱和門楣上。

en: They shall eat the flesh that night, roasted on the fire; with unleavened bread and bitter herbs they shall eat it.
zh: 當那一夜，你們要吃羊羔的肉，肉要用火烤了，和無酵餅與苦菜一同吃，

en: Do not eat any of it raw or boiled in water, but roasted, its head with its legs and its inner parts.
zh: 不可吃生的，也不可用水煮；只可吃用火烤的。頭、腿和內臟都一起吃。

en: And you shall let none of it remain until the morning; anything that remains until the morning you shall burn.
zh: 你們一點也不可留到早晨；如果有一點留到早晨，就要用火燒掉。

en: In this manner you shall eat it: with your belt fastened, your sandals on your feet, and your staff in your hand. And you shall eat it in haste. It is the LORD's Passover.
zh: 你們要這樣吃羊羔：腰間束上帶，腳上穿著鞋，手中拿著杖，快速地吃；這是耶和華的逾越節。

en: For I will pass through the land of Egypt that night, and I will strike all the firstborn in the land of Egypt, both man and beast; and on all the gods of Egypt I will execute judgments: I am the LORD.
zh: 因為在那一夜我要走遍埃及地，把埃及地所有頭生的，無論是人或是牲畜，都要殺掉；我也要審判埃及的一切神祇，我是耶和華。

en: The blood shall be a sign for you, on the houses where you are. And when I see the blood, I will pass over you, and no plague will befall you to destroy you, when I strike the land of Egypt.
zh: 這血要在你們居住的房屋上作你們的記號；我擊打埃及地的時候，一看見這血，就越過你們去，災禍必不臨到你們身上毀滅你們。

en: "This day shall be for you a memorial day, and you shall keep it as a feast to the LORD; throughout your generations, as a statute forever, you shall keep it as a feast.
zh: 這一日必作你們的記念日；你們要守這日為耶和華的節；你們要世世代代守這節日作永遠的定例。

en: Seven days you shall eat unleavened bread. On the first day you shall remove leaven out of your houses, for if anyone eats what is leavened, from the first day until the seventh day, that person shall be cut off from Israel.
zh: “你們要吃無酵餅七天；可是第一天就要把酵從你們的家中除去；因為從第一日起直到第七日，凡吃有酵之物的，那人必從以色列中被除滅。

en: On the first day you shall hold a holy assembly, and on the seventh day a holy assembly. No work shall be done on those days. But what everyone needs to eat, that alone may be prepared by you.
zh: 第一日你們要有聖會，第七日你們也要有聖會；這兩日之內，除了預備各人所要吃的以外，一切工作都不可作。

en: And you shall observe the Feast of Unleavened Bread, for on this very day I brought your hosts out of the land of Egypt. Therefore you shall observe this day, throughout your generations, as a statute forever.
zh: 你們要守無酵節，因為就在這一天，我把你們的軍隊從埃及地領出來；所以你們要世世代代守這一日作為永遠的定例。

en: In the first month, from the fourteenth day of the month at evening, you shall eat unleavened bread until the twenty-first day of the month at evening.
zh: 從正月十四日晚上起，直到本月二十一日晚上止，你們要吃無酵餅。

en: For seven days no leaven is to be found in your houses. If anyone eats what is leavened, that person will be cut off from the congregation of Israel, whether he is a sojourner or a native of the land.
zh: 七日之內在你們的家中不可有酵；因為凡吃有酵之物的，無論是外國人或是本地人，那人必從以色列的會眾中被剪除。

en: You shall eat nothing leavened; in all your dwelling places you shall eat unleavened bread."
zh: 凡是有酵的，你們都不可吃；在你們一切居住的地方，你們都要吃無酵餅。”

en: Then Moses called all the elders of Israel and said to them, "Go and select lambs for yourselves according to your clans, and kill the Passover lamb.
zh: 於是，摩西把以色列的眾長老召了來，對他們說：“你們要按著家族自己選取羊羔，把這逾越節的羊羔宰殺了。

en: Take a bunch of hyssop and dip it in the blood that is in the basin, and touch the lintel and the two doorposts with the blood that is in the basin. None of you shall go out of the door of his house until the morning.
zh: 要拿一把牛膝草，蘸在盆中的血裡，然後把盆裡的血塗在門楣上和兩邊的門柱上；你們誰也不可出自己的房門，直到早晨。

en: For the LORD will pass through to strike the Egyptians, and when he sees the blood on the lintel and on the two doorposts, the LORD will pass over the door and will not allow the destroyer to enter your houses to strike you.
zh: 因為耶和華要走遍各處擊打埃及人；他一看見門楣和兩邊的門柱上有血，就越過那門，不讓那毀滅者進入你們的房屋來擊殺你們。

en: You shall observe this rite as a statute for you and for your sons forever.
zh: 這教訓你們必須遵守，作為你和你的子孫永遠的定例。

en: And when you come to the land that the LORD will give you, as he has promised, you shall keep this service.
zh: 日後，你們進了耶和華應許賜給你們的那地的時候，就必須守這敬拜之禮。

en: And when your children say to you, 'What do you mean by this service?'
zh: 日後，如果你們的子孫問你們：‘你們這敬拜之禮有甚麼意思？’

en: you shall say, 'It is the sacrifice of the LORD's Passover, for he passed over the houses of the people of Israel in Egypt, when he struck the Egyptians but spared our houses.'"And the people bowed their heads and worshiped.
zh: 你們就要回答：‘這是獻給耶和華逾越節的祭。耶和華擊殺埃及人的時候，越過了在埃及的以色列人的房屋，救了我們的家。’”於是人民低頭敬拜。

en: Then the people of Israel went and did so; as the LORD had commanded Moses and Aaron, so they did.
zh: 以色列人就去行了；耶和華怎樣吩咐摩西和亞倫，以色列人就照樣行了。

en: At midnight the LORD struck down all the firstborn in the land of Egypt, from the firstborn of Pharaoh who sat on his throne to the firstborn of the captive who was in the dungeon, and all the firstborn of the livestock.
zh: 到了半夜，耶和華把埃及地所有的長子，就是從坐王位的法老的長子，直到監牢裡遭囚禁的人的長子，以及所有頭生的牲畜，都擊殺了。

en: And Pharaoh rose up in the night, he and all his servants and all the Egyptians. And there was a great cry in Egypt, for there was not a house where someone was not dead.
zh: 在那一夜，法老本人和他所有的臣僕，以及全埃及的人都起來了；在埃及有極大的哀號，因為沒有一家不死人的。

en: Then he summoned Moses and Aaron by night and said, "Up, go out from among my people, both you and the people of Israel; and go, serve the LORD, as you have said.
zh: 夜裡，法老把摩西和亞倫召了來，說：“你們和以色列人都起來，離開我的人民出去，照著你們所說的，去事奉耶和華吧；

en: Take your flocks and your herds, as you have said, and be gone, and bless me also!"
zh: 也照著你們所說的，連羊群牛群都帶著走吧，並且要為我祝福。”

en: The Egyptians were urgent with the people to send them out of the land in haste. For they said, "We shall all be dead."
zh: 埃及人催促以色列人，要他們趕快離開此地，因為他們說：“我們都要死了。”

en: So the people took their dough before it was leavened, their kneading bowls being bound up in their cloaks on their shoulders.
zh: 以色列人就拿了沒有發過酵的生麵，用衣服把摶麵盆綁好，扛在肩頭上。

en: The people of Israel had also done as Moses told them, for they had asked the Egyptians for silver and gold jewelry and for clothing.
zh: 以色列人照著摩西的話行了，他們向埃及人索取銀器金器和衣服。

en: And the LORD had given the people favor in the sight of the Egyptians, so that they let them have what they asked. Thus they plundered the Egyptians.
zh: 耶和華使以色列人在埃及人眼前蒙恩，埃及人就給了他們所要求的。這樣，他們就奪去了埃及人的財物。

en: And the people of Israel journeyed from Rameses to Succoth, about six hundred thousand men on foot, besides women and children.
zh: 以色列人從蘭塞起行到疏割去，除了小孩子以外，步行的男人約有六十萬。

en: A mixed multitude also went up with them, and very much livestock, both flocks and herds.
zh: 又有混雜多族的一群人和他們一同上去；他們還帶著羊群牛群和無數的牲畜同去。

en: And they baked unleavened cakes of the dough that they had brought out of Egypt, for it was not leavened, because they were thrust out of Egypt and could not wait, nor had they prepared any provisions for themselves.
zh: 他們把從埃及帶出來的生麵烘成了無酵的圓餅。這生麵原是沒有發過酵的，因為他們被驅逐離開埃及，所以不能停留，也沒有為自己預備食糧。

en: The time that the people of Israel lived in Egypt was 430 years.
zh: 以色列人住在埃及的時間共有四百三十年之久。

en: At the end of 430 years, on that very day, all the hosts of the LORD went out from the land of Egypt.
zh: 就在四百三十年屆滿的那一天，耶和華的全軍都從埃及地出來了。

en: It was a night of watching by the LORD, to bring them out of the land of Egypt; so this same night is a night of watching kept to the LORD by all the people of Israel throughout their generations.
zh: 這是向耶和華守的一夜，因為耶和華把他們從埃及地領出來，所以這一夜是所有以色列人世世代代向耶和華守的一夜。

en: And the LORD said to Moses and Aaron, "This is the statute of the Passover: no foreigner shall eat of it,
zh: 耶和華對摩西和亞倫說：“逾越節的定例是這樣，凡是外族人都不可以吃羊羔的肉。

en: but every slave that is bought for money may eat of it after you have circumcised him.
zh: 但是各人用銀子買回來的奴僕，如果你給他行了割禮，他就可以吃了。

en: No foreigner or hired servant may eat of it.
zh: 寄居和受雇的都不可以吃。

en: It shall be eaten in one house; you shall not take any of the flesh outside the house, and you shall not break any of its bones.
zh: 必須在同一間房子裡吃，你不可把一點肉從房子裡帶到外面；羊羔的骨頭，一根也不可折斷。

en: All the congregation of Israel shall keep it.
zh: 以色列全體會眾都要守這逾越節。

en: If a stranger shall sojourn with you and would keep the Passover to the LORD, let all his males be circumcised. Then he may come near and keep it; he shall be as a native of the land. But no uncircumcised person shall eat of it.
zh: 如果有外族人寄居在你們中間，也願向耶和華守逾越節，他所有的男子都要受割禮，然後他才可以前來守逾越節；他就必像本地人一樣，但所有未受割禮的人都不可以吃這羊羔。

en: There shall be one law for the native and for the stranger who sojourns among you."
zh: 本地人和寄居在你們中間的外族人，都同屬一例。”

en: All the people of Israel did just as the LORD commanded Moses and Aaron.
zh: 所有以色列人都奉行了；耶和華怎樣吩咐摩西和亞倫，他們就怎樣行了。

en: And on that very day the LORD brought the people of Israel out of the land of Egypt by their hosts.
zh: 就在這一天，耶和華按著他們的軍隊，把以色列人從埃及地領出來。
